title: LifeSmart Nature Mini PRO (Black Thermostat 0-10V) 11.015700 LS268-BT3
description:
Nature Mini PRO (Thermostat) reinvents the smart home control panel with a full screen, edge to edge touch pad, it could be thermostat, a scene panel, a weather display or even works as light controller. 480*480P high definition 4 inch display Works as both gateway and smart switch Built-in speaker All-in-one thermostat supporting 5 thermostat working modes Linux OS to ensure low-power and stable operation Supports voice control via Google and Alexa Remote control via mobile app Supports 2.5G+5G Wi-Fi connection Supports multiple protocols including CoSS, Zigbee, BLE, Wi-Fi
Adapter: black color | Packaging: English | HS code: 8471412000 | Package size: 8.6*8.6*3.6 | Weight: 0.243 kg
